title: これも普通のハプニング！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to bump into Matikanetannhauser while
she's mid-training and stop to talk with her
when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Awww! Look at that super cute stroller over there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It even has Umamusume ears attached to it! And
one of them has a pink ribbon. How sweet!
choice_data_list: I wonder if it's a baby Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That must be the baby's mom and dad next to the
stroller.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But the mom doesn't have Umamusume ears.
Maybe they're just racing fans.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! As if! Who would be a fan of someone as
average as m—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wha... Oh no!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It all happens in less than a second. The father's
backpack bumps against the stroller, and it starts
to roll down the riverbank quickly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash, dash, dash! Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Phew! Just in the nick of time...

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text: Oh my goodness!

text_block_list.name: Father
text_block_list.text: Are you all right?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine! I'm more worried about your baby! Wait,
where is she?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Safe in her mother's arms... I didn't even
realize...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Man, I can't believe I just dove after an empty
stroller. That was embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but it was all for nothing. The parents kept
apologizing and thanking me too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm really glad the cute stroller was fine, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Jeez... When am I finally gonna get a break? I just
wanna look really cool for once...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser may feel dissatisfied, but the
parents seem genuinely grateful.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Of course I didn't!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I thought the baby was going to hurtle down the
riverbank if I didn't do something.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sigh. But, well... Hehe. Guess I goofed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser tries to hide her
embarrassment by laughing, but I think she did a
really noble thing today.
